rulings.Case Title: MCCORL GILMORE JR VS. NATIONWIDE FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order Discharging Deft And X-Complainant Nationwide Life & Annuity Insurance Co. And Request For Attys' Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 29, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE LIFE AND ANNUITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Discharging Defendant And Cross-Complainant Nationwide Life & Annuity Insurance Co. And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S MOTION FOR DISCHARGE IS GRANTED. NATIONWIDE LIFE SHALL BE AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF $2,700 FROM THE INTERPLEADED FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT. NATIONWIDE LIFE IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NATIONWIDE LIFE'S PROPOSED ORDER IS ADOPTED. =(302/CWW/VC)
